engineering.translation: [Continuing from 5.27] The muni who has yoked the senses, mind. Intellect (yata-indriya-mano-buddhiḥ), who is intent on liberation (mokṣa-parāyaṇaḥ), and who has cast off desire, fear, and anger (vigata-icchā-bhaya-krodhaḥ). That one is always liberated (sadā mukta eva). Krishna names the somatic-discipline result begun in 5.27: senses-mind-intellect yoked, liberation-directed, freed of desire-fear-anger, sadā mukta — perpetually liberated. The 'always' (sadā) is structurally significant. STRETCHED honestly because the verse's metaphysical scope (mokṣa, perpetual liberation) exceeds the operational layer. The engineering analog at operational scope: the senior whose three-fold instrument-set (senses, mind, intellect) is linked across the workday, whose direction is consistent with the destination (per 5.17's fourfold pointing). Who has freed herself from desire-fear-anger drives is in the operating settled state. Perpetually, not episodically.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A staff engineer's workday. Senses yoked: she reads Datadog and Grafana dashboards purposefully, listens in standups for signal not noise, reviews PRs with calibrated attention. Mind yoked: her mental rehearsal is directed (Postgres-failure modes for the upcoming migration). Not random (the imagined Slack-thread argument with the peer from last month). Intellect linked: her analysis is decision-directed, not display-directed. Liberation-directed: her four pointers (per 5.17) point at the customer's payment-correctness. Desire-fear-anger drives are not driving: she has internalised 5.23's endurance practice. The result, observable in her workday across two years: the settled state holds continuously, not episodically. The morning incident does not unsettle it; the afternoon promotion-discussion does not unsettle it. Sadā mukta at operational scope. STRETCHED honestly; the metaphysical mokṣa exceeds.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'perpetually liberated' as a metaphysical claim about engineering tenure. The verse names a metaphysical state; the engineering analog scopes to operational continuity of the settled disposition. The metaphysical reach exceeds.
engineering.counter_example: When the perpetual-liberation claim is asserted across a single good week — when the operational continuity has not actually held across years — the verse does not apply. Sadā is structurally significant; the continuity is the diagnostic.
engineering.implication: Track the operational continuity of your settled state across a year. Does it hold across the morning incident, the afternoon promotion-discussion, the Friday near-failure? Sadā is the diagnostic.
engineering.quotable_line: Senses, mind, intellect yoked. The settled state holds continuously, not episodically. Sadā at operational scope.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 5.28 engineering layer drafted from triangulated source pack. Anchored to chapter-5 thesis: equivalence-of-paths-with-karma-yoga-preference, decoupled identity, sama-darśana, internal-bliss-source, brahma-nirvāṇa-as-operational-rung-with-honest-STRETCHED. Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
